allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/population-history.json'\); console.log\('Records:', d.records.length\); console.log\('First:', JSON.stringify\(d.records[0]\)\); console.log\('Last:', JSON.stringify\(d.records[d.records.length-1]\)\); console.log\('2025:', JSON.stringify\(d.records.find\(r=>r.year===2025\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/base-age-distribution.json'\); console.log\('Ages:', d.ages.length\); const sum = d.ages.reduce\(\(s,a\)=>s+a.count,0\); console.log\('Total people:', sum, '=', \(sum/100000000\).toFixed\(2\), '亿'\); console.log\('Sample age 0:', d.ages[0]\); console.log\('Sample age 100:', d.ages[100]\)")
